steps.name: Creating Inwarranty Job with Create Job API
Setting up the BaseURI , Content Type as Application/JSON and attaching the SensitiveData Filter for a role and attaching payload
Getting the Property Value from the config file
Getting the Auth token for the role

parameters.name: payload
parameters.value: CreateJobPayload[mst_service_location_id=1, mst_platform_id=2, mst_warrenty_status_id=1, mst_oem_id=1, customer=Customer[first_name=Jatin, last_name=Shharma, mobile_number=7045663552, mobile_number_alt=, email_id=jatinvsharma@gmail.com, email_id_alt=], customer_address=CustomerAddress[flat_number=D 404, apartment_name=Vasant Galaxy, street_name=Bangur nagar, landmark=Inorbit, area=Mumbai, pincode=411039, country=India, state=Maharashtra], customer_product=CustomerProduct[dop=2026-04-20T19:57:38.427335291Z, serial_number=134530332084456, imei1=134530332084456, imei2=134530332084456, popurl=2026-04-20T19:57:38.427476994Z, product_id=1, mst_model_id=1], problems=[Problems[id=1, remark=Battery Issue]]]
